SEARCH
Package com.skyblockexp.lifesteal.seasons.api

Interface SeasonsApi

public interface SeasonsApi
Public API exposed by EzSeasons so companion plugins can register for season events and features.

Threading: implementations in EzSeasons are internally synchronized for integration registry access, so concurrent calls are supported. However, callbacks and Bukkit events are executed on the calling thread. Callers should invoke this API from the Bukkit main thread unless they fully control thread-safety of all listeners and integrations involved.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<SeasonsIntegration>
    getIntegrations()
    Returns the currently registered integrations.
    boolean
    registerIntegration(SeasonsIntegration integration)
    Registers a plugin integration with EzSeasons.
    boolean

    Triggers a season reset immediately and emits SeasonResetEvent.
    void
    unregisterIntegration(SeasonsIntegration integration)
    Unregisters a previously registered integration.

  • Method Details

    • registerIntegration

      boolean registerIntegration(SeasonsIntegration integration)
      Registers a plugin integration with EzSeasons. The integration can listen for season events or interact with the API. Ordering guarantee: internal registration state is updated before SeasonsIntegration.onRegister(SeasonsApi) is invoked and before SeasonsIntegrationRegisteredEvent is dispatched.

      Exception behavior: exceptions thrown by SeasonsIntegration.onRegister(SeasonsApi) are not caught by EzSeasons; they propagate to the caller after the integration has already been added.

      Parameters:
      integration - integration implementation provided by another plugin; must be non-null
      Returns:
      true if registration succeeded and the integration is now active, otherwise false if this exact instance is already registered
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if integration is null

    • unregisterIntegration

      void unregisterIntegration(SeasonsIntegration integration)
      Unregisters a previously registered integration. Ordering guarantee: internal registration state is updated before SeasonsIntegration.onUnregister() is invoked and before SeasonsIntegrationUnregisteredEvent is dispatched.

      Exception behavior: exceptions thrown by SeasonsIntegration.onUnregister() are not caught by EzSeasons; they propagate to the caller after the integration has already been removed.

      Parameters:
      integration - integration instance previously registered; null is allowed and treated as a no-op
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if thrown by the integration callback

    • getIntegrations

      List<SeasonsIntegration> getIntegrations()
      Returns the currently registered integrations. The returned collection is a read-only snapshot of registration state at call time. Mutating the returned list is unsupported and will throw UnsupportedOperationException.

      API evolution note: a future major version may widen this return type to Collection<SeasonsIntegration> to avoid implying ordering or mutability semantics.

      Returns:
      an immutable snapshot list containing all currently registered integrations; never null

    • triggerSeasonReset

      boolean triggerSeasonReset(String reason)
      Triggers a season reset immediately and emits SeasonResetEvent. Ordering guarantee: season reset timestamps are updated and persisted before SeasonResetEvent is dispatched.
      Parameters:
      reason - caller-defined reason for observability (for example: "schedule", "admin", "migration"); may be null
      Returns:
      true if a season manager exists and a reset was triggered, otherwise false; never null
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if reset processing or downstream event handling throws
